title: Hamilton makes Silverstone scream as Ferrari confirm F1 future
summary:
Lewis Hamilton made Silverstone scream after claiming a shock Sprint pole ahead of this weekend’s British Grand Prix, edging out Kimi Antonelli by just 0.011s. 

Max Verstappen secured a surprise third on the grid for the fourth Sprint of the year, ahead of Charles Leclerc and George Russell. Just a couple of hours before Hamilton’s Sprint pole brilliance, Ferrari confirmed he would be staying for 2027. 

Join RacingNews365’s Nick Golding and Samuel Coop as they dissect Sprint qualifying at Silverstone!
